title: Cat Girl Animated Inventory
description: Adds animated Cat Girl to yours inventory
body:
Animated cat girl inventory GUI 🐱
Replaces the default inventory with a smooth animated interface to make Minecraft feel more alive and atmospheric. Perfect for cozy, anime, and fantasy styled gameplay.

**Required** [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)/[AnimaticaReforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/animaticareforged)/[Animatica Foxified](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica-foxified)
